issues.detail: Skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, such as missing credentials or invalid configuration.

scenarios.name: Route critical payment alerts to PagerDuty instead of Slack
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses flat match without match_re for the payment|billing regex and omits amtool config routes test verification; treatment mirrors the nested route tree, both pagerduty receivers, and the amtool verification step from the skill.

scenarios.name: Schedule a maintenance silence on web-01 via the Alertmanager API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for amtool helpers and misses the exact /api/v2/silences matcher schema and silence lifecycle endpoints; treatment uses the documented POST/GET/DELETE silence API calls verbatim.
